title: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode)
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Research Associate Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Kozhikode website. The last date to submit the application form is 05-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation in Mathematics from a leading National Institute with experience in networks, graph theory, and/or random matrix theory.
qualification.details: Research Associate: Post-Graduation in Mathematics from a leading National Institute. Experience in working with networks, graph theory, and or random matrix theory.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application details Interview (through video conference for shortlisted candidates)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Research Associate position at IIM Kozhikode is 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Post-Graduation in Mathematics from a leading National Institute and experience in networks, graph theory, and/or random matrix theory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 27 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on shortlisting of applications followed by an interview, which may be conducted via video conference for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply online through the official website of IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: IIM Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala, with the pincode 673570.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is C-39/2026-IIMK.HR.
